classifications.reasoning: This paper reports the initial results of the CheckMate 067 trial, a randomized, double-blind, phase 3 study with a unique trial registration number (NCT01844505). It introduces a newly randomized cohort and reports primary endpoints.

This paper reports the primary results of a phase 3 trial comparing ipilimumab with gp100 vaccine in metastatic melanoma, with a unique trial registration number (NCT00094653). It introduces a new cohort and reports primary endpoints.

This paper reports the primary results of the KEYNOTE-006 trial, a randomized, controlled, phase 3 study with a unique trial registration number (NCT01866319). It introduces a new cohort and reports primary endpoints.
This paper provides 3-year overall survival outcomes from the CheckMate 067 trial, which is already reported in PMID 26027431. It is an updated analysis of the same cohort.

This paper describes a randomized trial comparing neoadjuvant versus adjuvant ipilimumab plus nivolumab in stage III melanoma. It appears to introduce a new cohort, but lacks a trial registration number.
